name: pkcs-project-plan
title: brainstorm: Personal Knowledge Context Server project plan
description: Read the PKCS design document, organize project roadmap, clarify PRDs phase by phase, and preserve planning context in AGENTS.md during clarification.
creator: tantless
notes: Overall PKCS planning remains active. M1+M2 MVP and follow-up ingest/artifact improvements are complete. M3-M5 roadmap was refreshed on 2026-06-16 from the current implementation baseline; recommended next concrete task is M3 retrieval and Context Pack quality baseline.

completed_scope: M1+M2 local MVP with ingest/search/read_source/context_pack via CLI, HTTP health, and MCP tools.
Database modeling cleanup for source format, normalized format, knowledge type, int enum fields, Raw Archive identity, and generated canonical keys.
future_scope: M3 starts with retrieval and Context Pack eval baseline, then query router, lexical fusion, Context Pack v1, and optional semantic/rerank spike.
M4 adds source-specific profiles in order: AI conversation memory, official docs, code repository, entity/wiki, then email/work knowledge.
M5 adds personal eval gates, backup/restore, permissions/audit, reviewed wiki/memory condensation, and resource controls.
meta.recommended_next_task: brainstorm: PKCS M3 retrieval and Context Pack quality baseline
